title: psydaranta comosa
side_effects: Psydaranta comosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, which can manifest as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to nausea, vomiting, and stomach ulcers due to its high toxicity levels. Prolonged use or misuse of the plant may also result in neurological symptoms, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures in extreme cases. Additionally, improper use of psydaranta comosa can cause liver damage and kidney failure, emphasizing the need for caution and professional guidance when handling the plant.
